ensures.text: var ones: nat := CountInt(result, 1); var zeros: nat := CountInt(result, 0); var cn: nat := CountChar(s, 'n'); var cz: nat := CountChar(s, 'z'); var cr: nat := CountChar(s, 'r'); var co: nat := CountChar(s, 'o'); var ce: nat := CountChar(s, 'e'); |result| == ones + zeros

var ones: nat := CountInt(result, 1); var zeros: nat := CountInt(result, 0); var cn: nat := CountChar(s, 'n'); var cz: nat := CountChar(s, 'z'); var cr: nat := CountChar(s, 'r'); var co: nat := CountChar(s, 'o'); var ce: nat := CountChar(s, 'e'); result == seq(ones, (i: nat) => 1) + seq(zeros, (i: nat) => 0)

var ones: nat := CountInt(result, 1); var zeros: nat := CountInt(result, 0); var cn: nat := CountChar(s, 'n'); var cz: nat := CountChar(s, 'z'); var cr: nat := CountChar(s, 'r'); var co: nat := CountChar(s, 'o'); var ce: nat := CountChar(s, 'e'); FeasibleCounts(cn, cz, cr, co, ce, ones, zeros)

var ones: nat := CountInt(result, 1); var zeros: nat := CountInt(result, 0); var cn: nat := CountChar(s, 'n'); var cz: nat := CountChar(s, 'z'); var cr: nat := CountChar(s, 'r'); var co: nat := CountChar(s, 'o'); var ce: nat := CountChar(s, 'e'); forall x: nat, y: nat {:trigger BinaryGeq(ones, zeros, x, y)} {:trigger FeasibleCounts(cn, cz, cr, co, ce, x, y)} :: FeasibleCounts(cn, cz, cr, co, ce, x, y) ==> BinaryGeq(ones, zeros, x, y)
